ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Short code representing the location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the university is located */,
  "university_type" TEXT /* Type of university (e.g., public, private, research-intensive) */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* University website URL */,
  "logo" TEXT /* University logo file path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "score_scaled" REAL /* Scaled score of the university */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., global, regional, subject-specific) */,
  "ranking_provider" TEXT /* Organization providing the ranking */,
  "ranking_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the ranking methodology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_reputation" (
  "ar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic reputation entry */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking entry */,
  "ar_score" REAL /* Academic reputation score */,
  "ar_rank" INTEGER /* Academic reputation rank */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the metric in the overall ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_reputation_ranking_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_id") REFERENCES rankings ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employer_reputation" (
  "er_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employer reputation entry */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking entry */,
  "er_score" REAL /* Employer reputation score */,
  "er_rank" INTEGER /* Employer reputation rank */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the metric in the overall ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("er_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employer_reputation_ranking_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_id") REFERENCES rankings ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_student_ratio" (
  "fsr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty-student ratio entry */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking entry */,
  "fsr_score" REAL /* Faculty-student ratio score */,
  "fsr_rank" INTEGER /* Faculty-student ratio rank */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the metric in the overall ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fsr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_student_ratio_ranking_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_id") REFERENCES rankings ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations_per_faculty" (
  "cpf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citations per faculty entry */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking entry */,
  "cpf_score" REAL /* Citations per faculty score */,
  "cpf_rank" INTEGER /* Citations per faculty rank */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the metric in the overall ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cpf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_per_faculty_ranking_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_id") REFERENCES rankings ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "international_faculty_ratio" (
  "ifr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each international faculty ratio entry */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking entry */,
  "ifr_score" REAL /* International faculty ratio score */,
  "ifr_rank" INTEGER /* International faculty ratio rank */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the metric in the overall ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ifr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_international_faculty_ratio_ranking_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_id") REFERENCES rankings ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "international_student_ratio" (
  "isr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each international student ratio entry */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking entry */,
  "isr_score" REAL /* International student ratio score */,
  "isr_rank" INTEGER /* International student ratio rank */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the metric in the overall ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_international_student_ratio_ranking_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_id") REFERENCES rankings ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "international_research_network" (
  "irn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each international research network entry */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking entry */,
  "irn_score" REAL /* International research network score */,
  "irn_rank" INTEGER /* International research network rank */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the metric in the overall ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("irn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_international_research_network_ranking_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_id") REFERENCES rankings ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_enrollment_ratio" (
  "ger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender enrollment ratio entry */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking entry */,
  "ger_score" REAL /* Gender enrollment ratio score */,
  "ger_rank" INTEGER /* Gender enrollment ratio rank */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the metric in the overall ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_enrollment_ratio_ranking_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_id") REFERENCES rankings ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the university data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the university data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the university data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the university data */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device accessing the university data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data source (e.g., research publications, funding information) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the external data was last updated */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the external data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License terms for using the external data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integration event */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the integrated data */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was integrated */,
  "integration_method" TEXT /* Method used to integrate the external data (e.g., API, file upload) */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_integration_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_integration_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)
